Activation & Mobilisation Drills:
1 round
30sec e/s PVC Shoulder Opener
5 PVC Around the Worlds each way
5 PVC Pass Throughs
10 Band Row Rotate Press
10 World's Greatest Stretch
10m DB Walking Lunge 22.5/15
10 PVC Split Jerk
10 Strict Press

metcon.name: Workout
metcon.description:
12 min AMRAP
20 Russian Kettlebell swings @32/24kg
10 Reverse Lunges @ 60/40kg
4 Wall Walks

hypertrophy.reasoning: Targets posterior chain and arm development while sparing lower body and pressing muscles fatigued by jerk, squat, and metcon.

siri_text: Wednesday's workout. Strength: Split Jerk, 4 by 3 at 75 percent. Strength: Back Squat, 4 by 6 at 65 percent. Metcon: AMRAP 12 minutes: 20 Russian Kettlebell swings @32/24kg, 10 Reverse Lunges @ 60/40kg, 4 Wall Walks. For hypertrophy, focus on back, biceps, rear delts.
